label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is about when the telephone booth was fitted. The options are A through D. Let me read through the story again to find the relevant part. The first paragraph mentions: "It was a year ago that the phone line had been installed, six months later men from the public works department had come to put up the phone booth..." So, the phone line was installed a year ago, then six months later the booth was put up. Wait, so if it was a year ago that the line was installed, then six months after that would be 1.5 years ago? Or wait, the timeline here is that the phone line was installed a year ago. Then, six months later, the phone booth was put up. So that would be six months after the installation of the line. So the total time from when the line was installed to the booth being put up is six months. But the question is about fitting a working telephone booth. The story says that the phone line was installed a year ago, and then six months later the booth was installed. But then the painter came after that. The man is there now, and he mentions that the minister will come next month to inaugurate it. So the process isn't complete yet. The actual working telephone booth would require the inauguration by the minister, which is next month. But the options are about how long the process took. Let's look at the options again. Option A says the process took 12 months. The phone line was installed a year (12 months) ago, but the booth was put up six months after that. But the process of fitting a working booth would include getting the line installed, putting up the booth, and maybe other things. But the story says the phone line was installed a year ago, then the booth was put up six months later. So if the question is about the entire process of fitting a working booth, including the line and the booth, then maybe the total time is 1.5 years. But none of the options mention that. Option C says it should have been finished more than a year ago. But according to the story, the line was installed a year ago, and the booth was put up six months after that, so 18 months total. But the inauguration is next month, so the process is still not complete. So maybe the process was supposed to be completed earlier?
